maestro.description: Maestro orchestrator — exposes autonomous development capabilities as MCP tools

maestro_status.description: Get the current Maestro session status including milestone progress, active story, phase, and token spend

maestro_build.description: Start building a feature autonomously using the Maestro dev-loop. Decomposes into stories, dispatches agents, runs QA, and commits.

feature.description: Description of the feature to build

mode.description: Execution mode: yolo (auto-all), checkpoint (pause per story), careful (pause per phase)

maestro_plan.description: Generate a decomposition plan for a feature without executing it. Returns stories with dependency graph and cost estimate.

feature.description: Description of the feature to plan

maestro_squad_list.description: List all available agent squads with their roles and orchestration modes

maestro_health.description: Get the project health score (0-100) based on test coverage, type safety, lint compliance, dependency freshness, and tech debt
